name: Guard House
description: Racks of spears line the walls and a bounty ledger lies open on a table. Captain Bren paces by the window, eyes fixed on the tree line. 'The dungeon to the south is a problem,' he says without turning. 'We lost a man to whatever's nesting in there. It won't wait.' A door east leads onto the town walls; the guild hall is back to the south.
